title: How to write AI prompts for million dollar software
excerpt: After writing over 7,000 prompts for various production-ready software, doing over $10m ARR, Tim Hanson, co-founder of Penfriend.ai, has developed a proven system for designing, building, testing, and improving promp…

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Tim Hanson's Event Banner1920×1080 233 KB

After writing over 7,000 prompts for various production-ready software, doing over $10m ARR, Tim Hanson, co-founder of Penfriend.ai, has developed a proven system for designing, building, testing, and improving prompts.
And he wants to share that system with you. Exclusive for monday community members.

What you’ll learn:

  • How to design effective prompts
  • A systematic approach to building and testing prompts
  • Techniques for continuous improvement

Join us for a 1-hour online webinar on The Mansion - free to all!

REGISTER HERE
